title: Group an item when created from a form
excerpt:
Newbie user. I want to group new items created on the same board based on a field value. Items will be created from a form.

posts.author: Zoec (Zoe Costello)
posts.cookedHtml:
Newbie user. I want to group new items created on the same board based on a field value. Items will be created from a form.
E.g form has an Opt In / Opt out field. When the item is created I want it to automatically group depending on the Yes or No response in that field.

posts.author: timlittletech (Tim Little)
posts.cookedHtml:
hey @Zoec you could do this with a custom automation, if your opt in / opt out field is a status column
here is a screenshot of what the recipe would look like: Replace ‘Group Title’ with whatever you have named your group.

Screen Shot 2021-04-19 at 1.51.03 PM1812×819 24 KB

You probably only need this 1 automation since Yes or No is mutually exclusive.

Hope that helps

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
